mapper.insert: INSERT INTO app_voice_stat_event ( user_id, scope, provider_source, model_name, voice_name, template_code, status, event_day, request_fingerprint, text_chars, audio_bytes, latency_ms, cache_hit, duplicate_request, error_code ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{scope}, #{providerSource}, #{modelName}, #{voiceName}, #{templateCode}, #{status}, CURDATE(), #{requestFingerprint}, #{textChars}, #{audioBytes}, #{latencyMs}, #{cacheHit}, #{duplicateRequest}, #{errorCode} )
